name: coby-brain
description: The Coby brain plugged into Claude Code: identity-resolution brain that proxies the product-data sources your agent needs (PostHog usage, Pylon support) plus the Hyperline MCP for billing. One install, one prompt for your Coby key, one browser OAuth for Hyperline — and every Claude Code session is an expert on your users, your product, and your billing.

api_key.title: Coby brain API key
api_key.description: Bearer token for Coby's identity-resolution brain. Request a key from tom@joincoby.com.
